positive: Minimalist vector illustration of a celestial fox spirit, embodying both mythical grace and modern art style. The fox is depicted in a clean, flowing silhouette against a deeply contrasted cosmic background filled with nebulas and scattered geometric constellations. The composition is centered, featuring the fox spirit in a powerful, dynamic pose (e.g., leaping or sitting majestically). Use vibrant jewel tones (sapphire blue, amethyst purple, emerald green) balanced by stark whites and gold leaf accents for the stars. The style should evoke a blend of Art Deco geometry and Japanese Ukiyo-e ink painting, ensuring crisp lines and high visual contrast suitable for direct garment printing. Clean lines, flat planes of color, intricate yet readable details.
